name: CEDAR REALTY TRUST, INC.
summary: The Company is a REIT that focuses on owning and operating income producing retail properties with a primary focus on grocery-anchored shopping centers, predominantly located in the Northeast. At December31, 2025, the Company owned a portfolio of 12 properties totaling 1.9 million square feet of gross leasable area ("GLA"). The portfolio was 92.4% leased and 92.4% occupied at December31, 2025. The Company, organized as a Maryland corporation in 1984, has elected to be taxed as a REIT under appli...
